title: mentha × nemorosa var. morrenii
intro: Mentha × nemorosa var. morrenii, also known as Corsican mint or Morren's mint, is a hybrid of the wild mint species (Mentha × nemorosa) and is characterized by its compact growth and fragrant, pink-tinted leaves. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating digestive issues, headaches, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Mentha × nemorosa var. morrenii include reducing stress and anxiety, improving respiratory health, and aiding in the digestion of food, particularly in the treatment of indigestion and nausea. Herbal preparations of Mentha × nemorosa var. morrenii include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used fresh or dried to harness its medicinal properties.
